sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check what changed
before_seg = last_transition.before_frame.segmentation
after_seg = current_frame.segmentation

# Count gray (w) nodes before and after
before_w = [n for n in before_seg['nodes'] if n['color'] == 'w']
after_w = [n for n in after_seg['nodes'] if n['color'] == 'w']
print(f"Gray bars before: {len(before_w)}, after: {len(after_w)}")

# Check which bar was removed
before_hashes = {n['hash'] for n in before_w}
after_hashes = {n['hash'] for n in after_w}
removed = before_hashes - after_hashes
print(f"Removed bar hashes: {removed}")

# The bar at row 33, cols 38-40 was removed
# Let me remove the remaining 3 bars on row 33 (right side)
# They are at cols 43-45, 48-50, 53-55
action([
    {'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 33, 'col': 44},
    {'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 33, 'col': 49},
    {'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 33, 'col': 54}
])
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
